panelists.description: Panelist agents that analyze the codebase in parallel

judge.description: Synthesizes panel results into a structured implementation plan

validator.description: Checks whether the implementation matches the plan

label.description: Human-readable name shown in GUI and Telegram

tool.description: Which CLI to spawn. Multiple agents can share the same tool with different models.

model.description:
Model to pass to the CLI.
  claude:   claude-opus-4-5 | claude-sonnet-4-5 | claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 | ...
  opencode: anthropic/claude-opus-4-5 | openai/gpt-4o | google/gemini-2-flash | ...
  pi:       moonshot/kimi | anthropic/claude-opus-4-5 | openai/gpt-4o | ...
Omit to use each tool's currently configured default model.

systemPrompt.description: System prompt injected before the user message

promptFile.description: Path to a Markdown file containing the system prompt. Resolved relative to panelists.json. Either systemPrompt or promptFile is required.
